skills.name: Extract Invoice Data
skills.description: Navigates to the invoicing portal and extracts line items for a given date range

parameters.name: portal_url
parameters.label: Portal URL
parameters.helpText: The full URL of the invoicing portal login page

parameters.name: date_range_start
parameters.label: Start Date
parameters.helpText: Beginning of the extraction period

parameters.name: date_range_end
parameters.label: End Date
parameters.helpText: End of the extraction period

parameters.name: vendor_ids
parameters.label: Vendor IDs
parameters.helpText: Comma-separated list of vendor IDs to filter. Leave empty for all vendors.

skills.name: Scrape Product Prices
skills.description: Monitors competitor pricing pages and extracts current product prices into a spreadsheet

parameters.name: product_urls
parameters.label: Product Page URLs
parameters.helpText: One URL per line. Each URL should point to a specific product page.

parameters.name: competitor_name
parameters.label: Competitor Name
parameters.helpText: Name of the competitor for labeling in the output

parameters.name: output_format
parameters.label: Output Format
parameters.helpText: Format for the exported price data

skills.name: Submit Timesheet
skills.description: Fills and submits weekly timesheet entries on the HR portal for a specified employee

parameters.name: employee_id
parameters.label: Employee ID
parameters.helpText: The employee ID from the HR system

parameters.name: week_start
parameters.label: Week Starting
parameters.helpText: Monday of the week to submit for

parameters.name: hours_data
parameters.label: Daily Hours (Mon-Fri)
parameters.helpText: Comma-separated hours for Monday through Friday

parameters.name: project_code
parameters.label: Project Code
parameters.helpText: Project code to charge hours against

skills.name: Update CRM Contact
skills.description: Updates contact information in the CRM system for a specified contact record

parameters.name: contact_id
parameters.label: Contact ID
parameters.helpText: The CRM contact record ID

parameters.name: contact_email
parameters.label: New Email Address
parameters.helpText: Leave empty to keep the current email

parameters.name: contact_phone
parameters.label: New Phone Number
parameters.helpText: Leave empty to keep the current phone number

parameters.name: notes
parameters.label: Update Notes
parameters.helpText: Internal notes about why this contact was updated

skills.name: Generate Monthly Report
skills.description: Compiles data from multiple sources and generates a formatted monthly performance report

parameters.name: report_type
parameters.label: Report Type
parameters.helpText: Type of report to generate

parameters.name: department
parameters.label: Department
parameters.helpText: Department to generate report for

parameters.name: month
parameters.label: Report Month
parameters.helpText: Select any date in the month you want to report on

parameters.name: include_charts
parameters.label: Include Charts
parameters.helpText: Generate visual charts in the report

parameters.name: email_recipients
parameters.label: Email Recipients
parameters.helpText: Comma-separated email addresses to send the report to
